name: Flappy Harpy Daddy
short_description: Control a nearly-naked man flapping giant fans to fly through tough 3D stages! Click left/right to flap each arm. Run out of stamina and you'll fall helplessly! 🎥 Streaming, Let’s Plays, and monetization are fully welcome!
detailed_description:
Take control of a nearly-naked man wielding giant fans and flap your way through brutal 3D stages! Left and right mouse clicks flap each arm independently, sending you soaring—or crashing—through the air.

Watch your stamina: each flap drains it, and once it's gone, you'll be helpless for a few seconds as you fall all the way back down.

It's a ridiculous, challenging, and uniquely controlled flight game that will make you laugh, scream, and try again.

🎥 Streaming and monetized gameplay videos are fully welcome! Please feel free to share your experience with others.

Music: BGMer
